patch.value: Update npm dependencies: minor version bumps (sentry/cli, toon, node types, vitest, tsx)

6 packages have minor-version updates as of 2026-05-24: @sentry/cli 3.4.2->3.4.3, @toon-format/toon 2.2.0->2.3.0, @types/node 25.8.0->25.9.1, @vitest/coverage-v8 4.1.6->4.1.7, tsx 4.22.1->4.22.3, vitest 4.1.6->4.1.7. All are patch/minor bumps in dev or CLI dependencies. Dependabot has flagged vulnerabilities in vite, undici, brace-expansion, picomatch, minimatch, rollup which are transitive dev-deps; audit whether any direct dep update resolves them.
